languages.text: "Дозволяю вам разобраться с ним самостоятельно, но меня по этому поводу более не беспокойте".
"I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."
languages.original_text: "Дозволяю вам разобраться с ним самостоятельно, но меня по этому поводу более не беспокойте".

traits.locale_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."
"I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."
"I will leave this for you to resolve. Do not trouble me with this again."
"I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."
"I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

languages.text: “我允许你自行处理。不要再为此事来打扰我。”
languages.original_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

traits.locale_text: “我允许你自行处理。不要再为此事来打扰我。”

languages.text: «Tiene permiso para ocuparse de él personalmente, pero no vuelva a molestarme con esto».
languages.original_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene permiso para ocuparse de él personalmente, pero no vuelva a molestarme con esto».

languages.text: « Je vous donne l'autorisation de régler la question vous-même. Ne m'importunez plus à ce sujet. »
languages.original_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

traits.locale_text: Je vous donne l'autorisation de régler la question vous-même. Ne m'importunez plus à ce sujet.

languages.text: "Bizzat ilgilenmene izin veriyorum ancak bu konuda daha fazla rahatsız edilmek istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

traits.locale_text: "Bizzat ilgilenmene izin veriyorum ancak bu konuda daha fazla rahatsız edilmek istemiyorum."

languages.text: "Ich gestatte Euch, Euch selbst mit ihm zu befassen, aber behelligt mich in dieser Angelegenheit nicht mehr."
languages.original_text: "I grant you permission to deal with him yourself, but do not trouble me further on this matter."

traits.locale_text: Ich gestatte Euch, Euch selbst mit ihm zu befassen, aber behelligt mich in dieser Angelegenheit nicht mehr.

languages.text: 「この件はあなたに解決してもらいます。二度と私に持ち込まないでください。」
languages.original_text: "I will leave this for you to resolve. Do not trouble me with this again."

traits.locale_text: 「この件はあなたに解決してもらいます。二度と私に持ち込まないでください。」
